extortion.description: WING POH HARDWARE PTE LTD is a leading distributor of high-quality industrial, automotive, and garden tools in Singapore, offering products from renowned international brands. With 30 years of industry experience, the company serves a diverse clientele looking for reliable hand tools and abrasive products. Their extensive product range includes items like air impact wrenches, cordless electric screwdrivers, and various specialized tool accessories. Clients include both professionals and DIY enthusiasts seeking a one-stop solution for their hardware needs.
